summary: Content Seeding Engine Testing Complete. All 26 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verification confirmed: (1) Content Engine page renders at /app/admin/content-engine with stats, filters, story grid, (2) Generate modal shows batch size selector (10/25/50), category picker, auto-publish toggle, (3) Story cards show title, text, category, quality tags, score, and action buttons, (4) Non-admin users get 403 on all content-engine API endpoints (backend correctly blocks access), (5) Admin Dashboard has Content Engine link in nav bar.
critical_code_review_comments: content_engine.py POST /api/content-engine/generate uses real Emergent LLM key (GPT-4o-mini) for AI story generation
content_engine.py _quality_score() filters stories below score 50 - quality filtering working
content_engine.py _admin_required() checks user.role.upper() == 'ADMIN' for all endpoints
content_engine.py stores stories in seed_stories collection with proper structure
content_engine.py _publish_to_pipeline() creates pipeline_jobs for video generation
ContentEngine.js has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
ContentEngine.js GenerateModal has batch size (10/25/50), category picker, auto-publish toggle
ContentEngine.js StoryCard shows title, story_text, category, quality_tags, quality_score, status, action buttons
AdminDashboard.js has Content Engine link in admin nav at line 386
seed_data_creation: Generated 2 new stories via AI during testing (viral category)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Content Seeding Engine fully verified: (1) POST /api/content-engine/generate creates AI stories with quality filtering (score >= 50 passes), (2) GET /api/content-engine/list returns stories with filters (category, status, tag) and stats, (3) POST /api/content-engine/feature toggles featured status, (4) POST /api/content-engine/tag adds quality tags (HIGH_VIRAL, EMOTIONAL_HOOK, FAST_CONVERSION, WEAK), (5) POST /api/content-engine/publish/{story_id} publishes to pipeline_jobs, (6) POST /api/content-engine/publish-batch publishes all drafts, (7) DELETE /api/content-engine/{story_id} deletes stories, (8) GET /api/content-engine/social-scripts/{story_id} returns reel_script, caption, hashtags. All endpoints require admin role. Frontend at /app/admin/content-engine has stats (Total, Drafts, Published, Featured), category pills with counts, filter dropdowns, story grid with cards showing all story data and action buttons. Generate modal has batch size selector (10/25/50), category picker, auto-publish toggle.

POST_content_engine_generate.details: Admin can generate stories via AI with quality filtering. Returns generated count, rejected count, stories array

GET_content_engine_list.details: Returns stories with filters (category, status, tag) and stats (total, draft, published, featured, by_category)

POST_content_engine_feature.details: Toggles featured status on stories. Returns modified count

POST_content_engine_tag.details: Adds quality tags (HIGH_VIRAL, EMOTIONAL_HOOK, FAST_CONVERSION, WEAK). Invalid tags return 400

POST_content_engine_publish.details: Publishes single story to pipeline. Returns job_id. 404 for non-existent story

POST_content_engine_publish_batch.details: Publishes all draft stories. Returns published count and total_drafts

DELETE_content_engine_story.details: Deletes story. Returns 404 for non-existent story

GET_content_engine_social_scripts.details: Returns social_scripts (reel_script, caption, hashtags) for story. 404 for non-existent

Non_admin_403.details: All endpoints return 403 for non-admin users

Frontend_ContentEngine_Page.details: Page renders at /app/admin/content-engine with stats, filters, story grid

Frontend_Generate_Modal.details: Modal has batch size selector (10/25/50), category picker, auto-publish toggle

Frontend_Story_Cards.details: Cards show title, text, category, quality tags, score, status, action buttons

Admin_Dashboard_Link.details: Content Engine link present in admin nav bar

mocked_apis.note: AI generation uses real Emergent LLM key (GPT-4o-mini). No mocked APIs.
